title: Lively Designer
content: Developed a web-based kiosk orchestrating an end-to-end hardware loop. Managed MQTT-based environmental control for a 100" display, integrated iPad camera capture, and implemented IPP network printing with integrated queue management and hardware error-state handling.

title: Interactive Health
content: AdventHealth Interactive Health: Engineered a suite of zero-failure React kiosks for localized LAN deployment. Developed a matrix-driven scoring engine to categorize patient health personas, utilizing local MongoDB for data aggregation and Rive state machines for robust, high-performance animations across multiple hardware orientations.

title: ADV Flight 2030
content: Developed a high-pressure, one-week turnaround video sequencing engine for a multi-screen "Airplane Window" environment. Built a manifest-driven playback system with frame-accurate seeking to ensure each independent display was primed to sync with a live guided tour's narrative.

title: Tour Site
content: Simple WordPress site for Halo : Outpost Discovery interactive experience that ran in 2019. Used Twig and ACF. While the site is no longer running you can see a small preview at halopedia & web.archive.
